title: engine: add platform field to EngineConfig
body:
Issue: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/25641

This PR adds a new `platform` option to the `[engine]` section of `containers.conf`:

```toml
[engine]
platform = "linux/amd64"
```

This allows users to set a default platform (of the form `os/arch` or `os/arch/variant`) for image operations.

comments.body: As a general note the AI PR descriptions add nothing of value so just omit them, simply a short one sentence description with a link to the issue is enough for such a simple change

I've submitted draft PRs for the downstream changes:

* https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6698
* https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28154
Noting that the Buildah PR passed CI testing, Podman is still red tests there.

Changes LGTM
Just need to get the Podman tests happy, and then I'd like a final head nod from @Luap99
(The Podman PR points at a few design questions, at this point I wouldn’t rule out that we might want to change the syntax documented in this PR. But I’l leave that to experts.)

> Just need to get the Podman tests happy

I've rebased the branch and all checks for the PR are now passing except one, which appears to be due to [a disruption in testing farm](https://status.testing-farm.io).
